channel.title: GitHub Scala Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Scala in GitHub

item.title: apache/spark
item.description: Apache Spark - A unified analytics engine for large-scale data processing

item.title: twitter/the-algorithm
item.description: Source code for Twitter's Recommendation Algorithm

item.title: joernio/joern
item.description: Open-source code analysis platform for C/C++/Java/Binary/Javascript/Python/Kotlin based on code property graphs. Discord https://discord.gg/vv4MH284Hc

item.title: scala/scala3
item.description: The Scala 3 compiler, also known as Dotty.

item.title: zio/zio
item.description: ZIO — A type-safe, composable library for async and concurrent programming in Scala

item.title: open-korean-text/open-korean-text
item.description: Open Korean Text Processor - An Open-source Korean Text Processor

item.title: delta-io/delta-sharing
item.description: An open protocol for secure data sharing

item.title: apache/incubator-gluten
item.description: Gluten is a middle layer responsible for offloading JVM-based SQL engines' execution to native engines.

item.title: delta-io/delta
item.description: An open-source storage framework that enables building a Lakehouse architecture with compute engines including Spark, PrestoDB, Flink, Trino, and Hive and APIs

item.title: playframework/playframework
item.description: The Community Maintained High Velocity Web Framework For Java and Scala.

item.title: scala/scala
item.description: Scala 2 compiler and standard library. Scala 2 bugs at https://github.com/scala/bug; Scala 3 at https://github.com/scala/scala3

item.title: ucb-bar/chiseltest
item.description: The batteries-included testing and formal verification library for Chisel-based RTL designs.

item.title: broadinstitute/cromwell
item.description: Scientific workflow engine designed for simplicity & scalability. Trivially transition between one off use cases to massive scale production environments

item.title: akka/akka
item.description: A platform to build and run apps that are elastic, agile, and resilient. SDK, libraries, and hosted environments.

item.title: yahoo/CMAK
item.description: CMAK is a tool for managing Apache Kafka clusters

item.title: chipsalliance/chisel
item.description: Chisel: A Modern Hardware Design Language

item.title: apache/kyuubi
item.description: Apache Kyuubi is a distributed and multi-tenant gateway to provide serverless SQL on data warehouses and lakehouses.

item.title: sbt/sbt
item.description: sbt, the interactive build tool

item.title: gatling/gatling
item.description: Modern Load Testing as Code

item.title: gitbucket/gitbucket
item.description: A Git platform powered by Scala with easy installation, high extensibility & GitHub API compatibility
